title: Pink Eye in Children: 10 Herbal Creams to the Rescue
description: Aloe barbadensis creams are being used by some people to help soothe and treat pink eye. The gel of the aloe plant contains properties like anti-inflammatory agents, vitamins, and minerals, which can help reduce swelling and ease pain. Aloe barbadensis creams also contain compounds like aloin and aloe-emodin, which have antimicrobial properties that can help fight off bacterial infections that can cause pink eye.
